nasb.text: Yes, he wrestled with the angel and prevailed; He wept and sought His favor. He found Him at Bethel And there He spoke with us,

esv.text: He strove with the angel and prevailed; he wept and sought his favor. He met God at Bethel, and there God spoke with us—

cnv.text: 他與天使角力，並且得勝； 他哀哭，向他求恩。 他在伯特利遇見　神， 　神在那裡對他說話。

ccb.text: 他跟天使角力得胜， 向天使哭求福分。 他在伯特利遇见祂， 在那里与祂说话——
